name: Bee Hive Restaurant Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup clarified butter (slowly melted, with foam and solids removed) or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter or oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
2. Dredge the chicken lightly in flour and brown on one side, about 3 minutes.
3. Turn the chicken and brown on the other side.
4. Add chopped onion, salt, and pepper to taste, curry powder, and hot pepper flakes (if using).
5. Sauté briefly, then add chicken stock and half-and-half.
6. Stir and add coconut, raisins, and cashews.
7. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
8. Serve with white rice.
